title: CROWDAQ heartbeat event
description: Keepalive ping. Emitted by the backend every ~10 seconds when nothing else is happening. Widgets use it to flip the status indicator between `live` and `stale`, and to detect silent disconnects behind proxies.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC time the heartbeat was sent.

server_id.description: Optional backend-pod identifier. Useful for debugging stream-routing issues.
